title: System Critique Game
genericDescription: Represent institutions, platforms, markets, archives, art worlds, or AI systems as playable systems; reveal incentives; avoid simplistic villain design.
specificDescription: Build a game that critiques a system through rules and feedback loops. Include at least three stakeholder roles or forces that interact.
gradingRubric: 30 pts systemic critique; 20 pts stakeholder modeling; 20 pts playability; 15 pts nuance; 15 pts documentation.
